articles.title: New Fragnesia Linux flaw lets attackers gain root privileges - BleepingComputer
articles.description: Linux distros are rolling out patches for a new high-severity kernel privilege escalation vulnerability (known as Fragnasia and tracked as CVE-2026-46300)  that allows attackers to run malicious code as root.

articles.description: Nintendo has added five more Virtual Boy games to the ever expanding Nintendo Switch Online service library. The following 1995-released games are included in the update: Jack Bros…

articles.title: Microsoft’s multi-agent AI system tops Anthropic’s Mythos on cybersecurity benchmark - GeekWire
articles.description: Microsoft's new vulnerability-scanning system, codenamed MDASH, scored 88.45% on the CyberGym benchmark, surpassing single-model systems from Anthropic and OpenAI by using more than 100 specialized AI agents across multiple models.
